revision_summary: Three targeted fixes required: (1) SCHEMA MISUSE — cherry_pick_moments[2] (ts 00:38) incorrectly cites 'coaching_philosophy.setter_scope_discipline'; this moment is an off-script referral situation with no defined schema protocol, not a scope-creep instance. Remove or replace the schema reference with an explicit gap acknowledgment. cherry_pick_moments[4] (ts 02:28) incorrectly cites 'verify.interest_in_solar' for Walter's neighbor-advocacy statement; Walter is not being evaluated as a verify subject per Stage 3's own trajectory verdict. Remove or replace. (2) CLASSIFICATION ERROR — cherry_pick_moments[2] is classified as 'knowledge_gap' when the actual gap is a missing referral protocol, not a knowledge deficit. Reclassify appropriately. (3) MISSED MOMENT — Add a cherry_pick moment for the number-capture quality risk (ts 02:08–02:23): Walter gave the neighbor's number in fragmented, self-correcting pieces across multiple utterances and Bucky never read it back to confirm. This is the only actionable output of the call and its data integrity was not verified. This is a concrete coaching gap Stage 3 missed entirely. Secondary (non-blocking) notes for the revision pass: the starting_state reasoning at 00:10 slightly over-reads 'You called yesterday?' as a lead-premise signal when it's more plausibly a call-history question; tighten the framing to locate the premise collapse correctly at 00:22. The dead-air coaching cadence suggestion ('every 20-30 seconds') is not schema-grounded and should be softened or removed.
